title: Viners Assure 3.5” Paring Knife Stainless Steel Blade with Squared Tip for Safety, Soft Grip Handle, Non-Stick Coating, Rust-Resistant, Ideal for Cutting Fruit & Vegetables
features: PARING KNIFE | Cook with safety and performance assured. The Assure Paring Knife has a sleek and stylish blade designed to be safe to use in and around the home. Be at the forefront of the next generation of kitchen knives.

INNOVATIVE DESIGN | Featuring its squared tip, our paring knives are designed to be extra safe to use. Removing the pointed tip reduces the risk of accidents without compromising on the performance. The knife has a soft touch handle for a comfortable grip.

FINE QUALITY BLADE | The paring knife has a stainless steel blade that is rust-resistant and tempered to keep its edges sharp. The squared blade features a non-stick coating which reduces friction while cutting. Hand wash only.

ASSURE RANGE | Designed with safety, quality and performance in mind, the Assure range offers professional performance without compromising on style. The full collection includes essential knives and knife block sets.

VINERS HERITAGE | Viners is the leading cutlery specialist in the UK with an illustrious history dating back over 110 years. We inspire aspirational tablescapes and home entertaining. From elegant cutlery to stylish serve-ware, barware, and innovative food prep tools, we empower food enthusiasts to create with confidence.
